title: Titanium Tools
description: This Mod adds a new Material called Titanium that is rarely found in the end city loot
body:
Have you ever felt like you aren´t powerfull enough in the end game? Or that there isn´t anything to grind for? Well then look no further than Titanium Tools because it adds a new Material that is rarely found in End Cities and can create new Tools, Weapons and Armor which adds another layer of beeing op and in the end game

It is slightly stronger than netherite but much harder to optain. It aims to be for Vanilla+ scenarios
The crafting recipes are the same as for diamond but with Titanium Ingots. There is also a secret helmet that you might be able to obtain through combining a Titanium Helmet with something turtle-ish
